nasb.text: The skillfully woven band, which is on it, shall be like its workmanship, of the same material: of gold, of blue and purple and scarlet material and fine twisted linen.

esv.text: And the skillfully woven band on it shall be made like it and be of one piece with it, of gold, blue and purple and scarlet yarns, and fine twined linen.

cnv.text: 以弗得上面的帶子，它的巧工要和以弗得一樣，用來束上以弗得，要用金線、藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻做成。

ccb.text: 用金线和细麻线及蓝色、紫色、朱红色的线精工制作一条带子，缝在以弗得上，连成一整件。
